---
title: "Introduction to Logic"
subtitle: |
  The University of Chicago

  Spring Quarter 2026

  PHIL 20100/30000
author: Anubav Vasudevan
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: serif
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard:
      buttons: true
    incremental: true
    logo: university-of-chicago.png
    html-math-method: mathjax
    css: slides.css
---

{{< include lecture-1.qmd >}}
